query: # Digital Transformation and SME Performance in India

matches.title: KEY FACTORS OF COMPETITIVENESS IN SMES:  EVALUATION OF INNOVATION AND DIGITALIZATION  STRATEGIES
THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE EXPORT POTENTIAL OF SMALL BUSINESS IN UZBEKISTAN AND THE ROLE OF THE POPULATION'S DIGITAL LITERACY
matches.abstract: This article examines the relationship between the population's level of digital readiness and the realization of the export potential of small business entities in Uzbekistan amid the development of e-commerce. matches.title: Navigating Digitalization Advancement at SMEs: The Moderating Role of Government Policy in Emerging Markets
matches.abstract: This study investigates the influence of AI-driven automation and digital skill readiness on the digitalization process of SMEs in emerging economies, considering the moderating role of government policy. In light of the economic and infrastructural limitations common to these contexts, the study addresses a significant knowledge gap concerning how internal capabilities and external regulatory

matches.title: Digital Transformation in Business: Opportunities and Challenges for SMEs in Indonesia
matches.abstract: This dataset contains primary data from a survey of 454 SME owners and managers in the Jabodetabek region (Jakarta, Bogor, Depok, Tangerang, Bekasi), Indonesia. This study aims to empirically examine the impact of digital transformation on SME performance using the Partial Least Squares Structural Equation Modeling (PLS-SEM) method. matches.title: Digital Transformation Barriers and Performance Enhancement in Indonesian Small and Medium Enterprises: A Structural Equation Modeling Approach
matches.abstract: This dataset contains 650-response Indonesian SME survey on digital transformation barriers, management support, external assistance utilization, digital adoption success, and business performance. It includes item-level seven-point Likert responses, firm and respondent profile variables, 950-contact sampling frame, measurement-model checks, mediation analysis, and subgroup robustness checks.</
